title: Russian Springy Pork Wrap
description: A flavorful and nutritious pork wrap inspired by Russian cuisine, featuring springy ingredients. Perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Rub the pork knuckle with pork seasoning blend, making sure to coat all surfaces.
Place the pork knuckle on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and bake for 25 minutes, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While the pork is cooking, toast the Russian rye wrap in the oven for 2-3 minutes, or until crispy and lightly browned.
Once the pork is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing into thin strips.
Assemble the wrap by placing the sliced pork, magical springy greens, and a dollop of sour cream on the toasted rye wrap.
Top with dill pickle slices and serve immediately.
